title: anthyllis vulneraria proles arundana
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria proles arundana, also known as Kidney Vetch or Arundana, is a sub-species of the Anthyllis vulneraria plant, a type of flowering plant in the legume family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been used to treat wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Anthyllis vulneraria proles arundana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be used topically to apply the plant's medicinal properties directly to affected areas.
